name: Offboarding Employee
description: Comprehensive playbook for secure employee offboarding process to ensure proper access revocation, asset collection, and security controls when employees leave the organization.

phases.name: Preparation
phases.description: Initial preparation and documentation phase for employee offboarding.

tasks.title: Receive Offboarding Notification
tasks.content: Receive formal notification that an employee is leaving the organization and begin the offboarding process.

subtasks.title: Receive notification from HR
subtasks.content: Received formal notification from HR about employee departure including last working day and reason for departure.

subtasks.title: Notify IT and Security teams
subtasks.content: Notified IT and Security teams to begin offboarding preparations.

subtasks.title: Review employee role and access
subtasks.content: Reviewed employee's role, responsibilities, and access levels to plan appropriate offboarding steps.

tasks.title: Document Employee Access
tasks.content: Create a comprehensive inventory of all systems, applications, and resources the employee has access to.
outcomes: All systems and applications are documented

subtasks.title: Document system accounts
subtasks.content: Documented all system accounts including Active Directory, email, VPN, cloud services, and applications.

subtasks.title: Document privileged access
subtasks.content: Documented any privileged or administrative access the employee has.

subtasks.title: Document physical access
subtasks.content: Documented physical access including badges, keys, alarm codes, and building access.

subtasks.title: Document company assets
subtasks.content: Documented all company assets assigned to the employee including devices, equipment, and materials.

phases.name: Access Revocation
phases.description: Systematically revoke all access to systems, applications, and physical facilities.

tasks.title: Revoke System Access
tasks.content: Disable or remove the employee's access to all IT systems and applications on or after their last working day.

subtasks.title: Disable Active Directory account
subtasks.content: Disabled the employee's Active Directory account and all associated group memberships.

subtasks.title: Disable email account
subtasks.content: Disabled email account and set up forwarding if required by business needs.

subtasks.title: Revoke VPN and remote access
subtasks.content: Revoked VPN access, remote desktop access, and any other remote connectivity methods.

subtasks.title: Remove cloud service access
subtasks.content: Removed access to cloud services including SaaS applications, cloud storage, and collaboration tools.

subtasks.title: Revoke application access
subtasks.content: Revoked access to all business applications including CRM, ERP, databases, and specialized tools.

tasks.title: Revoke Physical Access
tasks.content: Revoke the employee's physical access to all company facilities and secured areas.
outcomes: Keys and access cards are collected

subtasks.title: Disable access badges
subtasks.content: Disabled all physical access badges and key cards in the access control system.

subtasks.title: Collect badges and keys
subtasks.content: Collected all physical badges, keys, and access cards from the departing employee.

subtasks.title: Update access codes
subtasks.content: Changed alarm codes, safe combinations, and any other access codes the employee knew.

subtasks.title: Update parking access
subtasks.content: Revoked parking permits and garage access if applicable.

tasks.title: Reset Shared Credentials
tasks.content: Reset all shared passwords, service accounts, and credentials that the departing employee had knowledge of.

subtasks.title: Reset shared passwords
subtasks.content: Reset all shared passwords and credentials that the employee had access to.

subtasks.title: Rotate service account credentials
subtasks.content: Rotated service account credentials and API keys the employee may have known.

subtasks.title: Update team accounts
subtasks.content: Updated credentials for any team or department accounts the employee had access to.

subtasks.title: Reset admin credentials
subtasks.content: Reset any administrative or privileged credentials the employee had access to.

phases.name: Asset Collection
phases.description: Collect all company property and assets from the departing employee.

tasks.title: Collect Company Assets
tasks.content: Collect all company-owned devices, equipment, documents, and other property from the departing employee.

subtasks.title: Collect computers and devices
subtasks.content: Collected all company-owned computers, laptops, tablets, and mobile devices.

subtasks.title: Collect peripherals and accessories
subtasks.content: Collected monitors, keyboards, mice, headsets, chargers, and other peripherals.

subtasks.title: Collect company documents
subtasks.content: Collected any physical company documents, files, and proprietary materials.

subtasks.title: Collect company credit cards
subtasks.content: Collected company credit cards, expense cards, and corporate accounts.

subtasks.title: Verify asset return
subtasks.content: Verified all assets against the documented inventory and obtained sign-off.

tasks.title: Backup and Transfer Data
tasks.content: Back up the employee's work data and transfer ownership of critical files and projects to appropriate team members.
outcomes: Employee's work data is backed up

subtasks.title: Backup employee files
subtasks.content: Created a backup of the employee's work files, emails, and documents for business continuity.

subtasks.title: Transfer file ownership
subtasks.content: Transferred ownership of shared files, folders, and documents to appropriate team members.

subtasks.title: Transfer project ownership
subtasks.content: Transferred ownership and responsibility for ongoing projects to designated individuals.

subtasks.title: Document knowledge transfer
subtasks.content: Documented critical knowledge, processes, and information the employee possessed.

phases.name: Review and Monitoring
phases.description: Review the employee's access history and monitor for any post-departure security concerns.

tasks.title: Review Data Access Logs
tasks.content: Review the employee's access logs and activity history to identify any suspicious or concerning behavior prior to departure.

subtasks.title: Review authentication logs
subtasks.content: Reviewed authentication logs for unusual access patterns or timing.

subtasks.title: Review file access logs
subtasks.content: Reviewed file access and download logs for mass data access or exfiltration attempts.

subtasks.title: Review email activity
subtasks.content: Reviewed email activity for forwarding to personal accounts or unusual external communications.

subtasks.title: Check for data exfiltration
subtasks.content: Checked for signs of data exfiltration via USB drives, cloud storage, or email.

tasks.title: Conduct Exit Interview
tasks.content: Conduct an exit interview with the departing employee to reinforce confidentiality obligations and collect final information.

subtasks.title: Conduct exit interview
subtasks.content: Conducted exit interview with HR present to discuss the transition and gather feedback.

subtasks.title: Review confidentiality agreements
subtasks.content: Reviewed confidentiality agreements, non-disclosure agreements (NDA), and non-compete clauses.

subtasks.title: Remind of obligations
subtasks.content: Reminded the employee of their ongoing obligations regarding confidential information and company property.

subtasks.title: Document exit interview
subtasks.content: Documented the exit interview and any relevant information for HR records.

tasks.title: Monitor for Post-Departure Activity
tasks.content: Monitor for any attempted access or suspicious activity from the departed employee after their last working day.

subtasks.title: Monitor access attempts
subtasks.content: Monitored logs for any attempts by the departed employee to access systems using old credentials.

subtasks.title: Set up alerts
subtasks.content: Set up alerts for any activity associated with the departed employee's accounts or identifiers.

subtasks.title: Monitor for data disclosure
subtasks.content: Monitored for any disclosure or misuse of company information by the departed employee.

phases.name: Completion
phases.description: Finalize the offboarding process and ensure all steps have been completed.

tasks.title: Document Offboarding Completion
tasks.content: Document that all offboarding steps have been completed and obtain sign-offs from appropriate stakeholders.

subtasks.title: Complete offboarding checklist
subtasks.content: Completed the full offboarding checklist verifying all steps have been performed.

subtasks.title: Obtain stakeholder sign-offs
subtasks.content: Obtained sign-offs from IT, Security, HR, and the employee's manager confirming completion.

subtasks.title: Update employee records
subtasks.content: Updated employee records in HRIS system to reflect departure and offboarding completion.

subtasks.title: Archive offboarding documentation
subtasks.content: Archived all offboarding documentation for future reference and audit purposes.
